Who We Are

About Summit Builders

Building with integrity since 2001. One project at a time, one handshake at a time.

Our Story

Built on Trust

Summit Builders was founded in 2001 by Mike Sullivan, a third-generation carpenter who grew up framing houses alongside his father and grandfather in the western suburbs of Chicago.

What started as a two-person crew working out of a garage in Downers Grove has grown into a full-service general contracting firm with a team of 30 skilled tradespeople and project managers. But the philosophy hasn't changed: show up on time, communicate clearly, build it right the first time, and stand behind your work.

Over 25 years, we've completed more than 500 projects — from kitchen remodels to ground-up custom homes to full commercial buildouts. Every one of them started with a conversation and a handshake.

What Drives Us

Our Values

🤝

Integrity

We give you an honest price, stick to the timeline we promised, and tell you the truth — even when it's not what you want to hear.

🎯

Craftsmanship

We don't cut corners. Every joint, every finish, every detail is done right because your home or business deserves nothing less.

💬

Communication

You'll never wonder what's happening on your project. Weekly updates, direct access to your project manager, and no surprises.

🏘️

Community

We live and work in the communities we build in. Our reputation is built one neighbor at a time, and we take that seriously.

The People

Our Leadership

Mike Sullivan

Founder & President

Third-generation carpenter. 30+ years in construction. Oversaw 500+ projects from foundation to finish.

Sarah Mitchell

Director of Operations

15 years in construction management. Keeps every project on schedule and on budget. Licensed PE.

Tom Ramirez

Senior Project Manager

Specializes in commercial buildouts and large-scale renovations. 20 years in the trades.

25+ Years in Business
500+ Projects Completed
30 Team Members
98% Client Referral Rate

Let's Build Something Together

Whether it's a kitchen remodel or a ground-up custom home, we'd love to hear about your project.
